phrases.text_local: Pode me indicar um restaurante bom perto daqui?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih MIH een-dee-KAHR OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih BOHNG PEHR-too duh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao pessoal do balcão; eles conhecem bem a zona e podem sugerir opções locais.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW pih-SOOAHL DOO bahl-KOWN; EH-lihsh koo-NYEH-sayng BAYNG AH ZOH-nuh EH PAW-dayng soo-zhih-REER awp-SOHNYSH loo-KEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the counter staff; they know the area well and can suggest local options.

responses.english: Ask the counter staff; they know the area well and can suggest local options.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW pih-SOOAHL DOO bahl-KOWN; EH-lihsh koo-NYEH-sayng BAYNG AH ZOH-nuh EH PAW-dayng soo-zhih-REER awp-SOHNYSH loo-KEYESH.
responses.french: Pergunte ao pessoal do balcão; eles conhecem bem a zona e podem sugerir opções locais.

likely_response.local: Pague no caixa e levante o café no balcão de pickup.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAH-gih NOO KEYE-shuh EH leh-VAHNNG-tih AW kuh-FEH NOO bahl-KOWN DIH pee-KOOP.
likely_response.translation_en: Pay at the cashier and pick up coffee at the pickup counter.

responses.english: Pay at the cashier and pick up coffee at the pickup counter.
responses.phonetic: PAH-gih NOO KEYE-shuh EH leh-VAHNNG-tih AW kuh-FEH NOO bahl-KOWN DIH pee-KOOP.
responses.french: Pague no caixa e levante o café no balcão de pickup.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I find the D. Rodrigo pastry?
phrases.text_local: Onde está o pastel D. Rodrigo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW puhsh-TEHL DEH. rood-REE-goo?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese bakeries typically display signature pastries in central glass cases for visibility.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pick up coffee
phrases.cultural_note: Coffee service in traditional Portuguese cafés often uses a dedicated pickup counter separate from ordering.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no balcão de café à frente.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DIH kuh-FEH AH FRAYNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the coffee counter ahead.

responses.english: Good morning, at the coffee counter ahead.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DIH kuh-FEH AH FRAYNG-tih.
responses.french: Bom dia, no balcão de café à frente.

phrases.text_local: Onde devo ir para levantar o café na Pastelaria Faro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih DEH-voo EER PUH-ruh leh-vahnng-TAHR AW kuh-FEH NUH puhsh-tih-luh-REEUH FAH-roo?

likely_response.local: Pague e pegue o café no balcão. A empregada serve os pastéis.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAH-gih EH PEH-gih AW kuh-FEH NOO bahl-KOWN. AH aymp-rih-GAH-duh SEH-ruh-vih OOSH puhsh-TEHEESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Pay and pick up your coffee at the counter. The server handles pastries.

responses.english: Pay and pick up your coffee at the counter. The server handles pastries.
responses.phonetic: PAH-gih EH PEH-gih AW kuh-FEH NOO bahl-KOWN. AH aymp-rih-GAH-duh SEH-ruh-vih OOSH puhsh-TEHEESH.
responses.french: Pague e pegue o café no balcão. A empregada serve os pastéis.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the receipt pickup shelf is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a prateleira dos recibos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH pruh-tih-LAY-ruh DOOSH reh-SEE-boosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Self-service receipt shelves are common in modern Portuguese retail and food venues to streamline checkout.

likely_response.local: Pode perguntar ao balcão ou ao caixa.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR OW bahl-KOWN OHW OW KEYE-shuh.
likely_response.translation_en: You can ask at the counter or the cashier.

responses.english: You can ask at the counter or the cashier.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR OW bahl-KOWN OHW OW KEYE-shuh.
responses.french: Pode perguntar ao balcão ou ao caixa.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso levantar o café aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo leh-vahnng-TAHR AW kuh-FEH uh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pode levantar o café no balcão de atendimento.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih leh-vahnng-TAHR AW kuh-FEH NOO bahl-KOWN DIH uh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too.
likely_response.translation_en: You can pick up your coffee at the front counter.

responses.english: You can pick up your coffee at the front counter.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih leh-vahnng-TAHR AW kuh-FEH NOO bahl-KOWN DIH uh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too.
responses.french: Pode levantar o café no balcão de atendimento.
